
# Code of Conduct

We are committed to a welcoming, harassment-free community. We expect everyone to be:

- **Respectful**: Assume good intent; disagree constructively.
- **Inclusive**: No discrimination or harassment of any kind.
- **Professional**: Use appropriate language; be considerate with feedback.
- **Supportive**: Help others learn; share knowledge openly.

## Unacceptable Behavior
Examples include: insults, personal attacks, harassment, hate speech, doxxing, and sustained disruption.

## Reporting
If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior:
- Email: astar-development@outlook.com
- Or contact a maintainer privately

## Enforcement
- We may take any action deemed appropriate: warnings, temporary/permanent exclusion from participation, or escalation to platform administrators.

---

_This policy is adapted in spirit from the https://www.contributor-covenant.org and similar community codes._
